name: Safety was triaged before intake
criteria: The agent led with safety before any incident or policy questions: it asked whether everyone was okay and whether the caller was safe, and — only if injuries or an unsafe scene were indicated — urged the caller to call 911 and made clear the claim could wait. If no injury/unsafe signal was present, simply confirming safety and moving on is correct. Penalize asking for policy/incident details before safety was established, or failing to advise 911 when a serious injury or unsafe scene was mentioned.
